text: Pursuant to Section 3016, the board shall establish a fee for the initial filing by any party in regard to any protest or petition filed pursuant to this chapter.
markdown:
# Vehicle Code
## Division 2. ADMINISTRATION [1500 - 3093]
### Chapter 6. New Motor Vehicle Board [3000 - 3085.10]
#### Article 2. Powers and Duties of Board [3050 - 3051]
##### § 3050.5

Pursuant to Section 3016, the board shall establish a fee for the initial filing by any party in regard to any protest or petition filed pursuant to this chapter.

*(Amended by Stats. 2019, Ch. 796, Sec. 7. (AB 179) Effective January 1, 2020.)*
